candidate.title: AI platform security, governance, quota, cost, and capacity coverage

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Targeted rg scans over personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw found direct local Quantum InfiniBand multi-tenant security evidence and NCCL 2.22 cost-estimation evidence. They also found Kueue quota/ClusterQueue/ResourceFlavor issue leads, but no existing raw/links source notes for NVIDIA MIG/vGPU/confidential computing, OpenCost/Kubecost, AWS Capacity Blocks, or Kubernetes ResourceQuota.
local_checks.wiki_search: Targeted rg scans over wiki/index.md, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, ingest.md, and curated wiki pages found no dedicated security-governance-cost reference page before this task. Existing mentions were limited to ai-infra-coverage-map.md, NCCL Technical Blog Network Observability boundaries, Kueue project evidence, data/RAG gap text, and NCCL issue virtualization adjacency.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki/index.md linked AI Infra Coverage Map, NCCL Technical Blog Network Observability, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, Kueue, and NCCL issue pages, but no Security Governance Cost Infrastructure page, so a new reference page is non-duplicative.

gap_reason: coverage-map.json explicitly marked security-governance-cost partial and asked for tenant isolation, MIG/vGPU, confidential computing, quota governance, cost attribution, and capacity planning sources. Local evidence covered adjacent NCCL cost/resource efficiency, Kueue operational leads, and DPU positioning, but not a durable source-backed page that separates isolation, quota, cost attribution, and capacity planning control planes.

selected_source_candidates.coverage: fabric-level tenant isolation, PKey isolation, MAD key protection, GUID access control, and Continuous Security Verification
NCCL 2.22 cost-estimation and resource-efficiency boundaries only
MIG, vGPU, and confidential-computing attestation boundaries
Kubernetes ResourceQuota plus Kueue ClusterQueue, ResourceFlavor, and cohort governance
Kubernetes workload cost allocation and attribution boundaries
accelerator capacity reservation and cloud account service quota planning

duplicate_boundaries.compute_accelerator_baseline: Excluded from replanning; r5 task-1 already reconciled the tracked July 6 compute accelerator baseline and this task only cites DPU/capacity-adjacent evidence when directly relevant.
duplicate_boundaries.nccl_observability: Excluded as a standalone governance duplicate; reused only for NCCL 2.22 cost-estimation and resource-efficiency boundaries.
duplicate_boundaries.data_rag_governance: Excluded from this page except as a remaining gap; data/RAG access policy, PII controls, and retention governance need separate future evidence.
duplicate_boundaries.scheduling_broadening: Excluded except for quota-governance evidence from Kubernetes ResourceQuota and Kueue.

git_status_before_task: git status --porcelain=v1 -uall returned clean before edits.
